center.name: 福建省
center.summary: 福建省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括黄腹角雉、黑领椋鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The population is divided into two subspecies, of which the dominant subspecies is found in the provinces of Fujian, Jiangxi, Zhejiang, and Guangdong, and T

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species is found in southern China from Fujian to Yunnan, and south to Burma, Laos, Cambodia, Vietnam and Thailand. An individual recorded in Brunei may be an escaped captive or a vagrant. It has been introduced to Taiwan, Malaysia and Singapore.{{cite encyclopedia |last1=Craig |first1=A
